# zenfra_vcs_integrations (Data Source)

Lists all Zenfra VCS integrations in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all GitHub integrations
data "zenfra_vcs_integrations" "github" {
  provider_type = "github"
}

# List all integrations
data "zenfra_vcs_integrations" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `provider_type` (String) Optional filter by VCS provider type (github or gitlab).

### Read-Only

- `integrations` (Attributes List) List of VCS integrations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--integrations))

<a id="nestedatt--integrations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `integrations`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the VCS integration.
- `name` (String) The display name of the VCS integration.
- `organization_id` (String) The organization ID this integration belongs to.
- `provider_type` (String) The VCS provider type (github or gitlab).
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration.
